episodes.title: FBI informant, docuseries star saves girls in FLDS cult
episodes.description:
Dr. Christine Marie, star of Netflix docuseries Trust Me: The False Prophet, joined KCTV5+ to unpack her journey helping abuse victims become free.

For more Local News from KCTV: https://www.kctv5.com/
For more YouTube Content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCie7RmdcnvXA1FXHRJa7WtA
